# Sandeep Singh — Full-Stack Developer

> Sandeep Singh is a full-stack developer based in Hyderabad, India, building web and
> mobile products with React, TypeScript, Node.js, React Native, and Astro. This site
> is his portfolio: selected projects and engineering writing.

## About

- Name: Sandeep Singh
- Role: Full-Stack Developer
- Location: Hyderabad, India
- Core stack: React, TypeScript, Node.js, React Native, PostgreSQL, Astro, Tailwind CSS
- Site: https://sandeepnayal.com

## Writing

- [Designing REST APIs That Age Well](https://sandeepnayal.com/blogs/designing-rest-apis-that-age-well/): Versioning, pagination, and the small naming decisions that decide whether an API is a joy or a chore.
- [Offline-First Sync in React Native](https://sandeepnayal.com/blogs/offline-first-react-native-sync/): Designing a sync queue that survives flaky connections, app restarts, and impatient users.
- [Building Optimistic UI in React Without a Library](https://sandeepnayal.com/blogs/building-optimistic-ui-react/): Making task updates feel instant, and handling the case when the server disagrees.

## Projects

- [TrackFlow — Project Management App](https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/trackflow-project-management-app/): A task and sprint management tool for small dev teams. React, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL.
- [FieldNote — Offline-First Notes](https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/fieldnote-mobile-app/): A React Native notes app that syncs the moment you're back online. React Native, TypeScript, Firebase.
- [Quill — Headless CMS API](https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/quill-headless-cms-api/): A lightweight content API with role-based access and a clean REST surface. Node.js, Hono, PostgreSQL, Docker.
- [Pulse — Analytics Dashboard](https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/pulse-analytics-dashboard/): Real-time product analytics with fast charts and a distraction-free UI. Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL.

## Links

- All projects: https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/
- All writing: https://sandeepnayal.com/blogs/

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sandeepsinghnayal/
